comment: F27 P9 T1g — acceptance floors lifted after the Editor + Architect prompt-tuning lift. Measured 2026-05-18 (T1g v2, matcher-tied verb rule + category disambiguation + Architect coverage breadth): macro recall 0.542 (was 0.219), macro precision_highest_stage 0.613 (was 0.250), F1_highest 0.574, per-PR recall min 0.500 (was 0.125), per-PR precision_highest min 0.500 (was 0.167). New floors sit at ~70-80% of measured so LLM nondeterminism flap stays below the gate. `corpus_precision_min` (validated-bucket) stays at 0.0 because that bucket is structurally empty under highest-stage tagging (kept for diagnostic surface but does not gate). Spec's nominal 80% recall / 90% precision is still the destination; the remaining headroom lives in Architect zone-coverage (T1h) — PR-975848 lines 178-198 fraction-computation core is still partially uncovered. `enforcement: report_only` until the corpus crosses 0.70 macro recall.
